valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Sat 4 Apr 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Sun 5 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: Atlantic low 1011 moving rather quickly northeast, expected Malin 982 by 1800 Saturday. High Biscay 1026 expected Trafalgar 1022 by same time
